textByHash.166405711444fe2d930d53fb1a1b6ad862b4a1c1: I'm sure the courier tried, but I suspect the ents didn't really understand him.
textByHash.80af7a137b2cba665567434df55fc21e82f2e86d: Unfortunately, we had someone new handling the delivery and they accidently left the cart in the way of the ents. I think the ents must have then considered both the cart and its contents to be a gift for them.
textByHash.901d5429e66b26fe66af07cd224639bb61c03aa1: I wouldn't say stole. I just think they misunderstood why the cart had been left there.
textByHash.bb0ea3631a2961c51763dd0e1e8a315eebcafad7: Tetamo, iknami! I hope you change your mind soon!
textByHash.cc2e40bb8b01e4d2c4af572846c5d2873b7c1593: Anyway, would you like to buy a staff?
textByHash.d8f28d0fa2a8d31510db5031fe1466a6d641a336: Welcome, adventurer. Are you looking for a sublime staff? I'm afraid a little issue with some ents means I don't have any battlestaffs for sale, but other than that, I'm sure I'll have what you need.
